description:
Remove the legacy Prim::Builtin variant and the BuiltinKind enum. All 42 references in the codebase must be routed through Prim::Extern instead. Authorized in prior session.

## Scope
- Delete BuiltinKind enum and Prim::Builtin variant from fz_ir.rs.
- Update all match arms across ir_interp.rs, ir_codegen.rs, ir_lower.rs, and any other files that reference them.
- Update any tests that construct or pattern-match on Prim::Builtin.
- Warnings are errors: zero remaining references.

## Acceptance
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes.
- All tests pass.
- One commit referencing fz-ext.8.
title: fz-ext.8: Remove BuiltinKind and Prim::Builtin
